# Elmar Kenigs — personal site

> Online resume for Elmar Kenigs, Lead Software Engineer (full-stack, decentralized web / dApps).

## Canonical URL

- https://ekenigs.github.io/

## What is here

- Single-page resume: summary, experience, education, projects, skills, portfolio, languages, interests.
- Source of truth for biographical and professional details is the HTML page at the URL above.

## For automated tools

- Prefer fetching `https://ekenigs.github.io/` for up-to-date content.
- Machine-readable sitemap: `https://ekenigs.github.io/sitemap-index.xml`
- Crawl policy: `https://ekenigs.github.io/robots.txt`
